channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Salmon sold at BJ’s Wholesale Club recalled over potential listeria contamination
item.description: The FDA announced a recall of Wellsley Farms Farm-Raised Atlantic Salmon sold at BJ's locations in seven states due to potential listeria contaminatio...

item.title: As boomer and Gen X bosses retire, working from home will make a major comeback, new research predicts
item.description: A new study of 8,000 workers confirms that Gen Z CEOs are set to bring back working from home as they take over—turning today’s office mandates into a...

item.title: Android Backdoor Pre-Installed On Devices — Thousands Already Infected
item.description: Kaspersky Threat Intelligence has confirmed that a fully functional malware backdoor is being distributed pre-installed on Android devices.

item.title: Meta Quest Owners To Get An Immersion Upgrade But It Won’t Come Cheap
item.description: Just weeks after it went public, Virtuix has joined the Made for Meta program to dramatically increase its addressable audience to include Meta Quest ...

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Wednesday, February 18
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Goldman Sachs to drop DEI board standards as Trump's anti-woke campaign spreads across corporate America
item.description: Goldman Sachs reportedly plans to drop DEI language from board criteria after conservative pressure, marking another corporate retreat from DEI progra...

item.title: Supply Chain Emissions Are No Longer Someone Else’s Problem
item.description: Corporate buyers are pushing emissions reporting onto suppliers, turning carbon data from a nice-to-have into a cost of doing business.

item.title: For success in AI, avoid the ‘efficiency trap’— and focus on trust instead
item.description: Trust can make or break success in AI implementation.

item.title: While big tech burns cash on AI, Apple waits
item.description: The company's apparent absence from the AI race may be its most disciplined strategic decision in years.

item.title: ‘ARC Raiders’ Confirms Its Coin Dupe Exploit Use Punishments
item.description: If you used the coin dupe exploit in ARC Raiders, you are about to be punished in some form or another by Embark. Here's how.

item.title: AI investments surge in India as tech leaders convene for Delhi summit
item.description: Blackstone, AMD, and Tata Consultancy Services unveil major infrastructure plans as OpenAI and Anthropic focus on India growth.

item.title: D-Wave CEO shrugs off short attacks with ‘revolutionary’ $550 million quantum computing acquisition
item.description: Less than 10% of D-Wave's clients are government research contracts, Alan Baratz says, proof it is offering commercially viable services.

item.title: Record percentage of fund managers are saying CEOs are overspending
Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance on political causes I oppose?
Economic calendar: Data on builder confidence and N.Y.-region manufacturing due
Has Paramount pulled its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery back from the brink?
California gas prices surge 40 cents in just 2 weeks as impact of refinery closures weighs
item.description: Refinery closures including Valero's Benicia facility leave California with six operating refineries, driving gas prices to the highest in nation at $...

item.title: Americans see bigger tax refunds so far this year as filing season begins at a slower pace
item.description: Americans are getting bigger tax refunds this year, with average refunds jumping to $2,290 - up 10.9% from last year, according to the latest IRS data...

item.title: U.S. stock futures flat as investors digest ongoing tech selloff
Living alone? The 'singles tax' that costs $10K a year
item.description: Living alone costs Americans over $10,000 extra per year in what experts call a "singles tax," as apartment rents surge nationwide, new data reveals.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
